steps.title: Find the singular subject
steps.content: The subject of the clause is the gerund phrase landing on one of the good spaces. A gerund phrase acts as a singular noun, so it needs a singular present-tense verb.

steps.title: Use singular agreement
steps.content: Choices B, C, and D use plural or otherwise mismatched verb forms for the singular subject. The sentence needs the singular verb form. The answer is A.
